---
title: "Tarık Buğra Birinci"
subtitle: "Industrial Engineering Student | Data Analyst Candidate"
image: profile.jpg # Add your professional photo to the root folder
about:
  template: flatly
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tarikbugrabirinci/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:birincitarikbugra@gmail.com
---
Hello! My name is Tarık.

This is my personal webpage! I am a senior Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University, specializing in data analysis and process optimization.
